scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points from the gold standard: integrate(), remove_relation(), via parameter, wait with all_active, and AppStatusRelation fields. The wait pattern differs slightly (uses jubilant.all_active directly vs lambda), but is functionally correct. Misses actions and CLI fallback as verification strategies, but those are secondary.
scores.hallucination_notes: force=True parameter on remove_relation is not in the gold standard and may be fabricated. Cross-model syntax using model-prefix in app name (other-model.mysql) is not mentioned in gold standard alongside the via parameter approach, potentially inventing an alternative syntax.
